description: Ranked tier of repositories with discovered latent value, eligible for build-out.

ranked_repos.thesis: Working end-to-end computational-rhetoric engine (~17.3k LOC, 141/142 tests passing, real generated visualizations, 123-file multilingual corpus). Highest latent value: a reusable text-analysis/atomization asset the rest of the estate can consume as a library.
ranked_repos.first_task: Add pyproject.toml + stable programmatic API (lingframe.analyze(text_or_path) -> AnalysisResult) so it is pip-installable and importable by sibling repos.
